mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO application (
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_id, application_name, application_code, can_integrate, api_key_supported, application_type, access_token_expires_in, refresh_token_expires_in, endpoint_url, context_path, status, description,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{applicationName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canIntegrate, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{apiKeySupported, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{applicationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accessTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refreshTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{endpointUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contextPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO application (
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_id, application_name, application_code, can_integrate, api_key_supported, application_type, access_token_expires_in, refresh_token_expires_in, endpoint_url, context_path, status, description,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.applicationName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.canIntegrate, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.apiKeySupported, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.applicationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.accessTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.refreshTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.endpointUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contextPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE application
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
application_name = #{applicationName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
can_integrate = #{canIntegrate, jdbcType=TINYINT},
api_key_supported = #{apiKeySupported, jdbcType=TINYINT},
application_type = #{applicationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
access_token_expires_in = #{accessTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER},
refresh_token_expires_in = #{refreshTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER},
endpoint_url = #{endpointUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key_algorithm = #{publicKeyAlgorithm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key_format = #{publicKeyFormat, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key = #{publicKey, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
application_code = #{applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, context_path = #{contextPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE application
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
application_name = #{applicationName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
can_integrate = #{canIntegrate, jdbcType=TINYINT},
api_key_supported = #{apiKeySupported, jdbcType=TINYINT},
application_type = #{applicationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
access_token_expires_in = #{accessTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER},
refresh_token_expires_in = #{refreshTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER},
endpoint_url = #{endpointUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key_algorithm = #{publicKeyAlgorithm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key_format = #{publicKeyFormat, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key = #{publicKey, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
application_code = #{applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
context_path = #{contextPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE application
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
application_name = #{applicationName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
can_integrate = #{canIntegrate, jdbcType=TINYINT},
api_key_supported = #{apiKeySupported, jdbcType=TINYINT},
application_type = #{applicationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
access_token_expires_in = #{accessTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER},
refresh_token_expires_in = #{refreshTokenExpiresIn, jdbcType=INTEGER},
endpoint_url = #{endpointUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key_algorithm = #{publicKeyAlgorithm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key_format = #{publicKeyFormat, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
public_key = #{publicKey, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
application_code = #{applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, context_path = #{contextPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE application
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_id, application_name, application_code, can_integrate, landing, api_key_supported, application_type, public_key_algorithm, access_token_expires_in, refresh_token_expires_in, endpoint_url, context_path, status, description, public_key, public_key_format,
delete_flag,
version FROM application WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_id, application_name, application_code, can_integrate, landing, api_key_supported, application_type, public_key_algorithm, access_token_expires_in, refresh_token_expires_in, endpoint_url, context_path, status, description, public_key, public_key_format,
delete_flag,
version FROM application

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
organ_id, application_name, application_code, can_integrate, landing, api_key_supported, application_type, public_key_algorithm, access_token_expires_in, refresh_token_expires_in, endpoint_url, context_path, status, description, public_key, public_key_format,
delete_flag,
version FROM application

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.application_code, a.organ_id FROM user_role_relation urr JOIN role_control_unit_relation rcur ON rcur.role_id = urr.role_id AND rcur.delete_flag = 0 AND rcur.status = 'ACTIVATED' JOIN control_unit cu ON cu.id = rcur.control_unit_id AND cu.delete_flag = 0 JOIN application a ON a.id = cu.application_id AND a.delete_flag = 0 JOIN application_suite aps ON aps.application_id = a.id AND aps.delete_flag = 0 AND aps.master_application_id = #{applicationId} WHERE urr.delete_flag = 0 AND urr.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.application_code, a.organ_id FROM role_control_unit_relation rcur JOIN control_unit cu ON cu.id = rcur.control_unit_id AND cu.delete_flag = 0 JOIN application a ON a.id = cu.application_id AND a.delete_flag = 0 JOIN application_suite aps ON aps.application_id = a.id AND aps.delete_flag = 0 AND aps.master_application_id = #{applicationId} WHERE rcur.delete_flag = 0 AND rcur.status = 'ACTIVATED' AND rcur.role_id IN
#{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
